abilities.name: Eldritch Summoning
abilities.description: Increases both Eldritch Summoning's current and max ability level. Increases the summoned Minor Imps' level. Attack Search Radius: 1200. Health Bonus: 0/80/160/240/320. Attack Damage Bonus: 0/4/8/12/16. Move Speed Bonus: 0/15/30/45/60. Duration: 15.

abilities.name: Fatal Bonds
abilities.description: Binds several enemy units together, causing a portion of the damage taken to one of them to be felt by the others. Cast Range: 1000. Bounce Distance: 700. Number of Bounces: 6 (6.04). Damage Shared: 15%/18%/21%/24% (19%/22%/25%/28%). Duration: 18. Cooldown: 42/34/26/18. Mana Cost: 120/130/140/150.

abilities.name: Shadow Word
abilities.description: Heals allied units and damages enemy units within the radius over time. Cast Range: 650/700/750/800. Radius: 225 (375). Damage per Second: 15/25/35/45. Heal per Second: 15/25/35/45. Duration: 10. Cooldown: 15/14/13/12. Mana Cost: 110/120/130/140.

abilities.name: Upheaval
abilities.description: As Warlock channels up to a certain time, Upheaval reaches its max power and its ability values no longer increases. All ability values stop increasing at the last 0.1-second of the channeling. Creates uncontrollable Minor Imps of the current Eldritch Summoning ability level per certain Upheaval channeling interval. Cast Range: 800. Effect Radius: 575/600/625/650 (625/650/675/700). Max Channel Time: 10/12/14/16. Damage Increment per Second: 10 (55). Move Speed Slow Increment per Second: 11%/14%/17%/20%. Linger Duration: 1. Cooldown: 60/50/40/30. Mana Cost: 100.

abilities.name: Chaotic Offering
abilities.description: The conjured Golem is partially immune to movement speed slow sources. Passively summons a Golem of its corresponding level on Warlock's death location, excluding Reincarnation sources. Cast Range: 900. Stun Radius: 600. Stun Duration: 0.8. Golem Spawn Interval: (0.5). Number of Golems: 1 (2). Slow Resistance: 60%. Cooldown: 200/400/600.
